scripts.desktop:sync: powershell -Command "if(Test-Path apps/desktop/out){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/desktop/out }; if(Test-Path apps/web/out){ Copy-Item -Path apps/web/out -Destination apps/desktop/out -Recurse -Force } else { Write-Host 'Warning: apps/web/out not found. Build web first to sync UI.' }"
scripts.clean:web: powershell -Command "if(Test-Path apps/web/.next){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/.next }; if(Test-Path apps/web/out){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/out }"
scripts.clean:desktop: powershell -Command "if(Test-Path apps/desktop/dist){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/desktop/dist }; if(Test-Path apps/desktop/out){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/desktop/out }; if(Test-Path apps/desktop/dist-electron){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/desktop/dist-electron }"
scripts.clean:builds: pnpm run clean:web && pnpm run clean:desktop
scripts.clean:all: pnpm run clean:builds && pnpm run clean:modules
